subcodes.first_line: O My Afnán! My tongue and My Most Exalted Pen bear witness that thou hast turned toward the horizon of God and directed thyself unto Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا افنانی یشهد لسانی و قلمی الاعلی انک انت اقبلت الی افق الله و توجهت الیه
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @thankfulness; gratitude, @praise and encouragement, @love of God
